subcodes.first_line: There hath come before the Wronged One a book wherein were inscribed the names of those who have turned toward God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی المظلوم کتاب و کان فیه اسماء الذین توجهوا الی الله المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
